category_sources: source_facts.description says Convert PostScript to EPS files; official README says ps2eps produces EPS/EPSF from one-page PostScript documents and calculates bounding boxes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ps2eps; official README title is ps2eps.
docs_sources: Official README says documentation is in the manpage or doc/ subdirectory; official repository contains the doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/roland-bless/ps2eps, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes PostScript-to-EPS conversion, bounding boxes, PDF crop assistance, and TeX/LaTeX inclusion use cases.
